headlines.description: Diogo Jota's early goal was enough to give Liverpool a tight 1-0 victory at Crystal Palace on Saturday and ensure the Reds go into the international break top of the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool beat Palace to retain Prem top spot

headlines.description: Arsenal bounced back from conceding a goal to lowly Southampton to win 3-1 after a pulsating second half in their Premier League clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saka steers Arsenal to win over Southampton

headlines.description: Wolverhampton Wanderers boss Gary O'Neil took "full responsibility" after Brentford registered a thumping 5-3 win over his beleaguered side in the Premier League on Saturday to leave them winless and bottom of the table after seven games.
headlines.shortLinkText: O'Neil takes 'full responsibility' as Wolves remain winless in Premier League

headlines.description: Facundo Buonanotte's goal lifted Leicester City to their first win of the Premier League season as they beat Bournemouth 1-0 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leicester beat Bournemouth 1-0 for first win of season

headlines.description: Mateo Kovacic scored either side of halftime to fire Manchester City to an entertaining 3-2 victory over Fulham at a sun-drenched Etihad Stadium on Saturday, as the hosts kept their grip on second place in the Premier League standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kovacic brace gives Man City victory over Fulham

events.name: Ipswich Town at West Ham United

headlines.description: West Ham United claimed their first home win in the Premier League under Julen Lopetegui as they beat promoted Ipswich Town 4-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Relief for Lopetegui as West Ham beat Ipswich

headlines.description: Anthony Gordon missed a penalty against his former side to spark an almighty roar from the home fans as Newcastle United were held to a 0-0 draw by Everton.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gordon penalty woe as Newcastle held by Everton
